title: Introduction to Unit Testing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the basics of software testing.

questions.question: What is the primary role of unit testing in software development?
options: To test individual units of source code, like functions or classes, in isolation

questions.question: Regarding unit testing, why is it beneficial to catching bugs early in the development cycle?
options: It reduces the time and cost to fix them
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
